info.title: BirdTransform – BirdCLEF 2026 Transformer Model
info.subtitle: BirdTransform is a PyTorch-based transformer model trained for the BirdCLEF 2026
info.description:
**BirdTransform** is a PyTorch-based transformer model trained for the **BirdCLEF 2026 Kaggle competition**.

The model learns bird vocalization patterns from mel-spectrogram representations of audio recordings and predicts multiple bird species present in each soundscape segment. ![BirdTransform](https://www.googleapis.com/download/storage/v1/b/kaggle-user-content/o/inbox%2F23151727%2Fee02c91cda88ca0c9a8ed9c54466b11d%2FBirdTransform_Thumbnail.png?generation=1773581425656187&alt=media)

The architecture combines a convolutional feature extractor with transformer layers to model temporal acoustic patterns in bird calls.

![Architecture](https://www.googleapis.com/download/storage/v1/b/kaggle-user-content/o/inbox%2F23151727%2F1a97d8714bd7b267ee00e7edf057a4bf%2FBirdTransform.png?generation=1773581354764388&alt=media)

This dataset provides the trained model weights and metadata required to run fast inference in a separate Kaggle competition notebook.

---

# Model Overview

Pipeline:

```
Audio (32 kHz)
      ↓
Mel Spectrogram
      ↓
CNN Encoder
      ↓
Transformer Layers
      ↓
Multi-Label Classification Head
```

The model predicts probabilities for all BirdCLEF species.

---

# Files Included

| File                 | Description                                |
| -------------------- | ------------------------------------------ |
| **bird_model.pth**   | Trained PyTorch model weights              |
| **species_list.npy** | Species labels in correct prediction order |
| **thresholds.npy**   | Optimized prediction thresholds            |

---

# Usage

Load the model and metadata in a Kaggle inference notebook to generate predictions for BirdCLEF soundscape recordings.

Example:

```python
species = np.load("species_list.npy", allow_pickle=True)

model = BirdTransformer()
model.load_state_dict(torch.load("bird_model.pth"))
model.eval()
```

---

# Competition

This dataset is designed for use in the **BirdCLEF 2026 Kaggle competition** for bird sound identification.
info.userSpecifiedSources: Training data originates from the BirdCLEF 2026 competition dataset, which contains wildlife audio recordings collected from the Pantanal wetlands in Brazil. The recordings include birds, insects, amphibians, mammals, and reptiles gathered through passive acoustic monitoring and public biodiversity databases.
